peak (where contemporaneous |ρ| > 0.4) and lags ∈ {1, 5, 20, 100}.

from __future__ import annotations

import sys
import time
import warnings
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

LOG = ROOT / "logs" / "progress.md"

LAGS = [1, 5, 20, 100]

def append_log(msg):
    ts = time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
    with LOG.open("a") as f:
        f.write(f"- [{ts}] {msg}\n")
